(Ma PorterPicks 6:52PM
LATE NIGHT NBA SELECTION for TUESDAY NIGHT
HOOPS
DETROI: PISTONS (-2.5) over LA LAKERS
(3-UNITS) & © &
7:40pm PST - NBC
Everyone is taking the Lakers because it's LaBron’s
birthday. However, the Pistons are aware of that and
will be motivated offensively to score points as they
are coming off a 2-game losing streak and haven't lost
three straight games all season long, plus the fact
they are coming off scoring only 99 points in their last
game which was their second lowest point total of
the season.
Remember, the Lakers have a bottom-five overall
defensive efficiency and come off only allowing 101
points to the Kings. Prior to that they allowed 119 to
the Rockets, 132 to the Suns and 135 to the Jazz in
three of their last four games!
The PISTONS are also 19-7 ATS as a FAVORITE this
season as well and we know that when the public
money is on LaBron James, the Lakers throw games
away. Not having Reeves could be missed tonight if
they are going to keep up with this Pistons team
tonight!
Done reading? Check out other channels. ©}
